parameters.name: get_quote
parameters.description: Current stock price and daily change for a ticker symbol. Parameters: symbol (required, e.g. AAPL, MSFT, TSLA). Use search_symbol first if you only know the company name.

parameters.name: get_company_profile
parameters.description: Company profile: industry, market cap, exchange, IPO date, website, logo. Parameters: symbol (required).

parameters.name: get_company_news
parameters.description: Recent news articles about a specific company. Parameters: symbol (required), days (optional, default 7, max 30), limit (optional, default 5, max 15).

parameters.name: search_symbol
parameters.description: Find ticker symbols by company name. Use when the user refers to a company by name (e.g. "Apple", "Tesla") and you need the symbol ("AAPL", "TSLA") for other tools. Parameters: query (required).

parameters.name: get_market_status
parameters.description: Check if a stock exchange is currently open. Parameters: exchange (optional, default US; also supports L, T, HK, etc.).

value.exchange: ={{ $fromAI('exchange', 'Exchange code (default US; e.g. L for London, T for Tokyo, HK)', 'string') }}
